title: Stentat
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Coruscant_system_TUF.jpg]] |name=Stentat |region=[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=*[[Corusca sector/Legends|Corusca sector]] **[[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]] |system=[[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' |coordinates=L-9 |xyz=0, 0, 0 |distance= |suns=1: [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]] |orbited= |position=8 |moons=23 |routes=*[[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] *[[Coruscant–Dantooine hyperlane]] *[[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]] *[[Leisure Corridor]]''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' *[[Martial Cross]] *[[Metellos Trade Route/Legends|Metellos Trade Route]] *[[Namadii Corridor/Legends|Namadii Corridor]] *[[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] *[[Shawken Spur]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Gas giant/Legends|Gas giant]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Admiral, is Zonama Sekot still orbiting between Muscave and Stentat?''"
"''To the best of our knowledge. But that planet is the Jedi's problem, not ours.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Traest Kre'fey]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''}} '''Stentat''' was one of two [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030403coruscant|text=Coruscant: Center of the Empire|int=Coruscant: Center of the Empire}} *{{CSWECite|I||Coruscant system}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Stentat |es=Stentat |pl=Stentat }} [[Category:Coruscant system locations]] [[Category:Gas giants]] [[Category:Planets in the Core Worlds]]
